nasb.text: And behold, one of those who were with Jesus reached and drew out his sword, and struck the slave of the high priest and cut off his ear.

esv.text: And behold, one of those who were with Jesus stretched out his hand and drew his sword and struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.

cnv.text: 有一個與耶穌在一起的人，伸手拔出刀來，砍了大祭司的僕人一刀，削掉他的一隻耳朵。

ccb.text: 耶稣的跟随者中有人伸手拔出佩刀朝大祭司的奴仆砍去，削掉了他一只耳朵。

csbs.text: 这时候，忽然有一个与耶稣在一起的人伸手拔出刀来，向大祭司的奴仆砍去，削掉了他的一个耳朵。
